name: armorclaude
description: ArmorIQ intent-based security enforcement for Claude Code: policy-based tool access control, intent verification, CSRG cryptographic proofs, and audit logging.

api_key.title: ArmorIQ API Key
api_key.description: Your ArmorIQ API key (get one at https://armoriq.ai). Leave blank to run in local-only mode without backend audit/intent.

default_template.title: Default policy template
default_template.description: Optional. One of: all-allow, strict-read-only, balanced, lockdown, architect, quality-guardian, velocity-machine, night-owl. On first run it is proposed (staged for your confirmation — never applied automatically). Leave blank to be shown the template picker instead.

disable_observability.title: Disable observability
disable_observability.description: Observability (execution traces sent to your ArmorIQ dashboard) is enabled by default. Set to true to turn it off.
